Package org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core

Class ConnectedSonarLintEngineImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core.AbstractSonarLintEngine
      • org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core.ConnectedSonarLintEngineImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    SonarLintEngine, ConnectedSonarLintEngine
    public final class ConnectedSonarLintEngineImpl
extends AbstractSonarLintEngine
implements ConnectedSonarLintEngine

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from class org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core.AbstractSonarLintEngine

        LOG, logOutput

      Constructor Description
      ConnectedSonarLintEngineImpl​(ConnectedGlobalConfiguration globalConfig)  

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      AnalysisResults analyze​(ConnectedAnalysisConfiguration configuration, IssueListener issueListener, ClientLogOutput logOutput, ClientProgressMonitor monitor)
      Trigger an analysis
      ProjectBinding calculatePathPrefixes​(String projectKey, Collection<String> ideFilePaths)
      Tries to find the best way to match files in a IDE project with files in the sonarqube project identified with projectKey, by finding file path prefixes to be used later in other interactions with the project storage.
      Map<String,​ServerProject> downloadAllProjects​(EndpointParams endpoint, HttpClient client, ClientProgressMonitor monitor)
      Attempts to download the list of projects and to return all projects by key
      void downloadAllServerHotspots​(EndpointParams endpoint, HttpClient client, String projectKey, String branchName, ClientProgressMonitor monitor)
      Download all hotspots, regardless of their status, from a project.
      void downloadAllServerHotspotsForFile​(EndpointParams endpoint, HttpClient client, ProjectBinding projectBinding, String ideFilePath, String branchName, ClientProgressMonitor monitor)
      Fetch all hotspots, regardless of their status, from a project on the server, and store them in local storage.
      void downloadAllServerIssues​(EndpointParams endpoint, HttpClient client, String projectKey, String branchName, ClientProgressMonitor monitor)
      Downloads and stores all server issues for a given project.
      void downloadAllServerIssuesForFile​(EndpointParams endpoint, HttpClient client, ProjectBinding projectBinding, String ideFilePath, String branchName, ClientProgressMonitor monitor)
      Downloads and stores server issues for a given file.
      void downloadAllServerTaintIssuesForFile​(EndpointParams endpoint, HttpClient client, ProjectBinding projectBinding, String ideFilePath, String branchName, ClientProgressMonitor monitor)
      Downloads and stores server taint issues for a given file.
      CompletableFuture<ConnectedRuleDetails> getActiveRuleDetails​(EndpointParams endpoint, HttpClient client, String ruleKey, String projectKey)
      Return rule details in the context of a given project (severity may have been overridden in the quality profile).
      List<ServerTaintIssue> getAllServerTaintIssues​(ProjectBinding projectBinding, String branchName)
      Gets locally stored server taint issues.
      AnalysisEngine getAnalysisEngine()  
      <G> List<G> getExcludedFiles​(ProjectBinding projectBinding, Collection<G> files, Function<G,​String> fileIdePathExtractor, Predicate<G> testFilePredicate)
      Get a list of files that are excluded from analysis, out of the provided files.
      Collection<PluginDetails> getPluginDetails()
      Get information about the analyzers that are currently loaded.
      ProjectBranches getServerBranches​(String projectKey)
      Returns analyzed branches for a given project.
      Collection<ServerHotspot> getServerHotspots​(ProjectBinding projectBinding, String branchName, String ideFilePath)
      Returns locally stored hotspots that were previously downloaded from the server.
      List<ServerIssue> getServerIssues​(ProjectBinding projectBinding, String branchName, String ideFilePath)
      Gets locally stored server issues for a given file.
      List<ServerTaintIssue> getServerTaintIssues​(ProjectBinding projectBinding, String branchName, String ideFilePath)
      Gets locally stored server taint issues for a given file.
      boolean isSecurityHotspotsDetectionSupported()  
      org.sonarsource.sonarlint.core.ConnectedSonarLintEngineImpl.AnalysisContext start()  
      void stop​(boolean deleteStorage)  
      void subscribeForEvents​(EndpointParams endpoint, HttpClient client, Set<String> projectKeys, Consumer<ServerEvent> eventConsumer, ClientLogOutput clientLogOutput)  
      void sync​(EndpointParams endpoint, HttpClient client, Set<String> projectKeys, ClientProgressMonitor monitor)  
      void syncServerHotspots​(EndpointParams endpoint, HttpClient client, String projectKey, String branchName, ClientProgressMonitor monitor)
      Sync server hotspots incrementally for a given project (will only work for supported servers).

      Sync server issues incrementally for a given project (will only work for supported servers).

      Sync server taint issues incrementally for a given project (will only work for supported servers).

      Update given project.

                                                                    HttpClient client,
                                                                    String ruleKey,
                                                                    @Nullable
                                                                    String projectKey)
        Description copied from interface: ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Return rule details in the context of a given project (severity may have been overridden in the quality profile).
        Specified by:
        getActiveRuleDetails in interface ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        projectKey - if null, the default QP will be considered

      • getPluginDetails

        public Collection<PluginDetails> getPluginDetails()
        Description copied from interface: SonarLintEngine
        Get information about the analyzers that are currently loaded. Should only be called when engine is started.
        Specified by:
        getPluginDetails in interface SonarLintEngine

      • downloadAllProjects

        public Map<String,​ServerProject> downloadAllProjects​(EndpointParams endpoint,
                                                           HttpClient client,
                                                           @Nullable
                                                           ClientProgressMonitor monitor)
        Description copied from interface: ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Attempts to download the list of projects and to return all projects by key
        Specified by:
        downloadAllProjects in interface ConnectedSonarLintEngine

      • getServerBranches

        public ProjectBranches getServerBranches​(String projectKey)
        Description copied from interface: ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Returns analyzed branches for a given project. Requires a ConnectedSonarLintEngine.sync(EndpointParams, HttpClient, Set, ClientProgressMonitor) to have been successfully done before for this project.
        Specified by:
        getServerBranches in interface ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Returns:
        branches analyzed on the server for this project.

      • getServerIssues

        public List<ServerIssue> getServerIssues​(ProjectBinding projectBinding,
                                         String branchName,
                                         String ideFilePath)
        Description copied from interface: ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Gets locally stored server issues for a given file.
        Specified by:
        getServerIssues in interface ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Parameters:
        projectBinding - information about the project (must have been previously updated with ConnectedSonarLintEngine.updateProject(EndpointParams, HttpClient, String, ClientProgressMonitor))
        ideFilePath - relative to the project.
        Returns:
        All server issues in the local storage for the given file. If file has no issues, an empty list is returned.

      • getServerTaintIssues

        public List<ServerTaintIssue> getServerTaintIssues​(ProjectBinding projectBinding,
                                                   String branchName,
                                                   String ideFilePath)
        Description copied from interface: ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Gets locally stored server taint issues for a given file.
        Specified by:
        getServerTaintIssues in interface ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Parameters:
        projectBinding - information about the project (must have been previously updated with ConnectedSonarLintEngine.updateProject(EndpointParams, HttpClient, String, ClientProgressMonitor))
        branchName - branch name
        ideFilePath - relative to the project.
        Returns:
        All server taint issues in the local storage for the given file. If file has no issues, an empty list is returned.

      • getAllServerTaintIssues

        public List<ServerTaintIssue> getAllServerTaintIssues​(ProjectBinding projectBinding,
                                                      String branchName)
        Description copied from interface: ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Gets locally stored server taint issues.
        Specified by:
        getAllServerTaintIssues in interface ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Parameters:
        projectBinding - information about the project (must have been previously updated with ConnectedSonarLintEngine.updateProject(EndpointParams, HttpClient, String, ClientProgressMonitor))
        branchName - branch name
        Returns:
        All server taint issues in the local storage for the given branch.

      • getExcludedFiles

        public <G> List<G> getExcludedFiles​(ProjectBinding projectBinding,
                                    Collection<G> files,
                                    Function<G,​String> fileIdePathExtractor,
                                    Predicate<G> testFilePredicate)
        Description copied from interface: ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Get a list of files that are excluded from analysis, out of the provided files.
        Specified by:
        getExcludedFiles in interface ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Parameters:
        projectBinding - Specifies the binding to which the files belong.
        files - The files that will be process to detect which ones are excluded from analysis
        fileIdePathExtractor - Provides a IDE path of each file. The path will be processes using the binding prefixes.
        testFilePredicate - Indicates whether a file is a test file.
        Returns:
        The list of files that are excluded from analysis.

      • subscribeForEvents

        public void subscribeForEvents​(EndpointParams endpoint,
                               HttpClient client,
                               Set<String> projectKeys,
                               Consumer<ServerEvent> eventConsumer,
                               @Nullable
                               ClientLogOutput clientLogOutput)
        Specified by:
        subscribeForEvents in interface ConnectedSonarLintEngine

      • downloadAllServerIssuesForFile

        public void downloadAllServerIssuesForFile​(EndpointParams endpoint,
                                           HttpClient client,
                                           ProjectBinding projectBinding,
                                           String ideFilePath,
                                           String branchName,
                                           @Nullable
                                           ClientProgressMonitor monitor)
        Description copied from interface: ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Downloads and stores server issues for a given file. Starting from SQ 9.6, this is noop as issues updates are coming by SSE.
        Specified by:
        downloadAllServerIssuesForFile in interface ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        projectBinding - information about the project (must have been previously updated with ConnectedSonarLintEngine.updateProject(EndpointParams, HttpClient, String, ClientProgressMonitor))
        ideFilePath - relative to the project in the IDE.

      • downloadAllServerTaintIssuesForFile

        public void downloadAllServerTaintIssuesForFile​(EndpointParams endpoint,
                                                HttpClient client,
                                                ProjectBinding projectBinding,
                                                String ideFilePath,
                                                String branchName,
                                                @Nullable
                                                ClientProgressMonitor monitor)
        Description copied from interface: ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Downloads and stores server taint issues for a given file. Starting from SQ 9.6, this is noop as taint issues updates are coming by SSE.
        Specified by:
        downloadAllServerTaintIssuesForFile in interface ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        projectBinding - information about the project (must have been previously updated with ConnectedSonarLintEngine.updateProject(EndpointParams, HttpClient, String, ClientProgressMonitor))
        ideFilePath - relative to the project in the IDE.

      • downloadAllServerIssues

        public void downloadAllServerIssues​(EndpointParams endpoint,
                                    HttpClient client,
                                    String projectKey,
                                    String branchName,
                                    @Nullable
                                    ClientProgressMonitor monitor)
        Description copied from interface: ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Downloads and stores all server issues for a given project.
        Specified by:
        downloadAllServerIssues in interface ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Parameters:
        endpoint - from which to download issues
        projectKey - key of the project (must have been previously updated with ConnectedSonarLintEngine.updateProject(EndpointParams, HttpClient, String, ClientProgressMonitor))

      • syncServerIssues

        public void syncServerIssues​(EndpointParams endpoint,
                             HttpClient client,
                             String projectKey,
                             String branchName,
                             @Nullable
                             ClientProgressMonitor monitor)
        Description copied from interface: ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Sync server issues incrementally for a given project (will only work for supported servers).
        Specified by:
        syncServerIssues in interface ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Parameters:
        endpoint - from which to download issues
        projectKey - key of the project

        Sync server taint issues incrementally for a given project (will only work for supported servers).

        projectKey - key of the project

      • syncServerHotspots

        public void syncServerHotspots​(EndpointParams endpoint,
                               HttpClient client,
                               String projectKey,
                               String branchName,
                               @Nullable
                               ClientProgressMonitor monitor)
        Description copied from interface: ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Sync server hotspots incrementally for a given project (will only work for supported servers).
        Specified by:
        syncServerHotspots in interface ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Parameters:
        endpoint - from which to download issues
        projectKey - key of the project

      • downloadAllServerHotspots

        public void downloadAllServerHotspots​(EndpointParams endpoint,
                                      HttpClient client,
                                      String projectKey,
                                      String branchName,
                                      @Nullable
                                      ClientProgressMonitor monitor)
        Description copied from interface: ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Download all hotspots, regardless of their status, from a project. Download will be made only for servers that return enough data to achieve local hotspot tracking.
        Specified by:
        downloadAllServerHotspots in interface ConnectedSonarLintEngine

      • downloadAllServerHotspotsForFile

        public void downloadAllServerHotspotsForFile​(EndpointParams endpoint,
                                             HttpClient client,
                                             ProjectBinding projectBinding,
                                             String ideFilePath,
                                             String branchName,
                                             @Nullable
                                             ClientProgressMonitor monitor)
        Description copied from interface: ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Fetch all hotspots, regardless of their status, from a project on the server, and store them in local storage. Download will be made only for servers that return enough data to achieve local hotspot tracking.
        Specified by:
        downloadAllServerHotspotsForFile in interface ConnectedSonarLintEngine

      • getServerHotspots

        public Collection<ServerHotspot> getServerHotspots​(ProjectBinding projectBinding,
                                                   String branchName,
                                                   String ideFilePath)
        Description copied from interface: ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Returns locally stored hotspots that were previously downloaded from the server.
        Specified by:
        getServerHotspots in interface ConnectedSonarLintEngine

      • calculatePathPrefixes

        public ProjectBinding calculatePathPrefixes​(String projectKey,
                                            Collection<String> ideFilePaths)
        Description copied from interface: ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Tries to find the best way to match files in a IDE project with files in the sonarqube project identified with projectKey, by finding file path prefixes to be used later in other interactions with the project storage. Requires the storage of the project to be up to date.
        Specified by:
        calculatePathPrefixes in interface ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        ideFilePaths - List of relative paths of all file belonging to the project in the IDE

      • updateProject

        public void updateProject​(EndpointParams endpoint,
                          HttpClient client,
                          String projectKey,
                          @Nullable
                          ClientProgressMonitor monitor)
        Description copied from interface: ConnectedSonarLintEngine
        Update given project.
        Specified by:
        updateProject in interface ConnectedSonarLintEngine

      • stop

        public void stop​(boolean deleteStorage)
        Specified by:
        stop in interface ConnectedSonarLintEngine
